name: 4Minute's Mr. Teacher
overview: "4Minute's Mr. Teacher" is a television program created to help the group expand into overseas markets and grow into global Hallyu stars. In the show, handsome teachers from Thailand, Japan, Taiwan, China, and other regions are invited to teach the members their local languages and cultures, preparing 4Minute for international activities.

trailers.title: 포미닛의 한류과외 티처 大공개 ! ٩( ᐛ )و  네? 이 사람들이..ㄲ..꽃미남이라구요..? #포미닛의_미스터티처_1회
